content.fact_text: Integrates the resilience middleware components (Rate Limiter, Error Handler, Tracing) into a unified, configurable stack for the ecommerce backend entry point.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a centralized resilience stack integrating correlation tracing, Redis-backed distributed rate limiting, and global error sanitization for Express applications. Provides lifecycle management via startup/shutdown hooks and health checks.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a single entry-point for the traffic resilience subsystem, standardizing the application pipeline and ensuring production-grade observability and infrastructure resilience.
